content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/database.py:1	import sqlite32	from flask import g3	4	DATABASE = 'database.db'5	6	def get_db():7	    db = getattr(g, '_database', None)8	    if db is None:9	        db = g._database = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE)10	        db.row_factory = sqlite3.Row11	    return db12	13	def init_db(app):14	    with app.app_context():15	        db = get_db()16	        with app.open_resource('schema.sql', mode='r') as f:17	            db.cursor().executescript(f.read())18	        db.commit()19	20	def close_connection(exception):21	    db = getattr(g, '_database', None)22	    if db is not None:23	        db.close()
